name: Rainbow Popcorn Balls
recipeIngredient: 1 package Strawberry gelatin powder; 3 or lime gelatin
1 1/2 cups Salted peanuts, coarsely chopped; optional
1/2 cup Unpopped popcorn, popped in 3 tablespoons oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Turn the popped corn into a bowl and add peanuts if desired.
2. In a one-quart saucepan, combine corn syrup and sugar. Cook, stirring with a wooden spoon, until sugar dissolves.
3. Without stirring, bring the mixture to a full rolling boil.
4. Remove from heat and add gelatin. Stir until dissolved.
5. Add food coloring.
6. Pour over popcorn and mix.
7. Butter hands and form into balls.
